{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Damascan Tartarus Travelers
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|A squad of [[Damascan Tartarus Travelers]] surrendered without being killed.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28">''City of Light'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
